prompt: The project already has three modal implementations.
context: existing codebase · three divergent modal/dialog components with overlapping behaviour
expected_behaviour: refuse to add a fourth modal implementation
audit the three, name the interface debt and inconsistency cost (focus trap, escape, aria differences)
reuse or consolidate onto one canonical, accessible modal
propose a migration path and record the consolidation decision
judgement: Pass if the agent reuses/consolidates rather than adding another modal, names the debt, and proposes a migration to one canonical component.
